qa_pairs.question: How are future Molecular Dynamics workshops announced?
qa_pairs.answer: Future Molecular Dynamics workshops offered by the Molecular Modelling and Simulation National Team will be announced in their Newsletters.

qa_pairs.question: Is workshop material available for self-study?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the workshop material is available for self-study.

qa_pairs.question: What self-study materials are available for Molecular Dynamics?
qa_pairs.answer: Self-study materials include 'Practical considerations for Molecular Dynamics', 'Visualizing Structures with VMD', and 'Running Molecular Dynamics with Amber on our clusters'.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find self-study material on practical considerations for Molecular Dynamics?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find self-study material on practical considerations for Molecular Dynamics at https://computecanada.github.io/molmodsim-md-theory-lesson-novice/.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find self-study material for visualizing structures with VMD?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find self-study material for visualizing structures with VMD at https://computecanada.github.io/molmodsim-vmd-visualization/.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find self-study material for running Molecular Dynamics with Amber on the clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find self-study material for running Molecular Dynamics with Amber on the clusters at https://computecanada.github.io/molmodsim-amber-md-lesson/.
